rationale: Review 1 correctly approves a PR whose assumptions are already minimally general (bialgebra for mapValue, Hopf for instGroup, cocommutativity only for instCommGroup). Review 2's only finding asks for a companion to a `private` auxiliary lemma that is unused in the file and whose corresponding group-level fact follows automatically from the Group typeclass; no maintainer would clearly insist on this, so acting on it yields no meaningful improvement.
